name: Jeffrey B Templin DDS
legalName: Jeffrey B Templin, DDS — Family Dentistry
seoDescription: Jeffrey B Templin DDS is a second-generation family dentistry practice at 65 St James Dr in the Larkfield area of Santa Rosa, CA — preventive, restorative, and cosmetic care for the whole family.

contact.address: 65 St James Dr, Santa Rosa, CA 95403

sections.heading: The family dentist Santa Rosa families have trusted for generations
sections.subheading: Dr. Jeffrey Templin is a second-generation dentist carrying on the practice his father built in Larkfield — gentle, unhurried care for kids, parents, and grandparents alike.

sections.heading: Care that treats you like family — because most of our patients are
sections.body: Dr. Templin trained at UCLA and grew up in this practice. Patients describe a team that is competent, conscientious, and personable — the kind of office where the hygienists know your name and the kids actually look forward to their visit.
points: Families who have trusted the Templins for 25+ years
Massage chairs to make every visit more comfortable
Friendly, efficient team that makes you feel at home

sections.heading: Complete dentistry, all in one Larkfield office
sections.intro: From routine cleanings to crowns, implants, and cosmetic work — most of what your family needs is handled right here.

items.title: Preventive & Hygiene
items.body: Cleanings, exams, sealants, and home-care guidance to keep healthy smiles healthy.

items.title: Restorative Care
items.body: Crowns, bridges, fillings, root canal therapy, and dentures to restore comfort and function.

items.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
items.body: Thoughtful cosmetic work to brighten and refine your smile, at your own pace.

items.title: Family Friendly
items.body: Kids love coming here. We care for every generation under one roof.

items.quote: Friendly, efficient, highly skilled and very experienced professionals. AND… amazingly, also very reasonably priced!
items.author: W.S.T.

items.quote: We've gone to Dr. Templin and his father for over 25 years and wouldn't trust anyone else with our teeth.
items.author: Longtime patient family

sections.heading: Looking for a dentist who feels like family?
sections.body: Dr. Templin is welcoming new patients in Larkfield. Find us at 65 St James Dr, Santa Rosa — call (707) 545-8191 and we'll be glad to help.

sections.heading: Comprehensive care for every smile in the family
sections.subheading: From the first checkup to crowns, implants, and cosmetic work — Dr. Templin offers a full range of general and family dentistry at 65 St James Dr.

items.title: Cleanings & Preventive Care
items.description: Routine cleanings, exams, sealants, mouth guards, and home-care instruction to keep your family's teeth healthy and catch problems early.

items.title: Crowns, Bridges & Fillings
items.description: Durable, natural-looking crowns, bridges, and restorative fillings to repair damaged or decayed teeth and protect your bite.

items.title: Dental Implants
items.description: Permanent, natural-feeling replacements for missing or failing teeth, restoring both function and confidence.

items.title: Root Canal Therapy
items.description: Comfortable, gentle root canal treatment to relieve pain and save teeth that would otherwise be lost.

items.title: Dentures & Partials
items.description: Full and partial dentures fitted for comfort and a natural look, with care taken to get the details right.

items.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
items.description: Cosmetic procedures to brighten and refine your smile, shaped around what you actually want.

items.title: Gum Disease & TMJ Care
items.description: Treatment for gum disease and TMD/TMJ therapy, plus nutrition counseling to support long-term oral health.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call (707) 545-8191 and our team will find a time that works and answer any questions.

items.title: We get to know you
items.body: Dr. Templin reviews your history, listens to your concerns, and walks you through what he sees.

items.title: We make a plan
items.body: Together we map out the care you need — no pressure, no surprises, at a pace that suits you.

items.title: We take care of it
items.body: From cleanings to crowns, the work is done gently and done right, with the comfort of a massage chair.

sections.heading: Have a question about your care?
sections.body: We're glad to talk it through. Call (707) 545-8191 or stop by 65 St James Dr, Santa Rosa.

sections.heading: A Larkfield practice built by one generation and carried on by the next
sections.subheading: Dr. Jeffrey Templin grew up in this office. Today he cares for many of the same families his father did — some for more than 25 years.

sections.heading: Two generations, one chair
body: Jeffrey B Templin DDS is a second-generation family dentistry practice in the Larkfield area of Santa Rosa. Dr. Templin trained at UCLA and stepped into the practice his father built, carrying on the same approach: treat people the way you'd want your own family treated.

That continuity is the whole point. Many of the families who sit in Dr. Templin's chair today were patients of his father — some for more than 25 years. As one longtime family put it, they 'wouldn't trust anyone else with our teeth.' Patients describe a team that is competent, conscientious, efficient, and personable, with hygienists they swear by and a doctor the kids actually like.

Little touches make the difference here — like the massage chairs in every room — but the real difference is the feeling of being known. This is the kind of neighborhood practice where you're a name, not a chart number.
highlights: Massage chairs in every treatment room

sections.heading: Come see why families stay
sections.body: Dr. Templin is welcoming new patients. Find us at 65 St James Dr, Santa Rosa, or call (707) 545-8191.

sections.heading: Visit Dr. Templin in Larkfield
sections.blurb: Jeffrey B Templin DDS is at 65 St James Dr, Santa Rosa, CA 95403. Call (707) 545-8191 to schedule — we're welcoming new patients and glad to help.
